Choose Your Profession

Dietitian & Nutritionist RDN (Registered Dietitian Nutritionist) CDR Registration Examination for Dietitians Compact Enacted Occupational Therapist OTR (Occupational Therapist Registered) NBCOT® OTR Exam Compact Enacted Physical Therapist PT (Licensed Physical Therapist) NPTE (National Physical Therapy Examination) Compact Active Respiratory Therapist RRT (Registered Respiratory Therapist) TMC (Therapist Multiple-Choice) & CSE (Clinical Simulation Exam) No Compact Speech-Language Pathologist CCC-SLP (Certificate of Clinical Competence) Praxis® Examination in Speech-Language Pathology Compact Active Audiologist AuD (Doctor of Audiology) Praxis® Examination in Audiology Compact Active Pharmacy Technician CPhT (Certified Pharmacy Technician) PTCE (Pharmacy Technician Certification Exam) No Compact Pharmacist RPh (Registered Pharmacist) NAPLEX (North American Pharmacist Licensure Examination) & MPJE No Compact

About This Hub

State Licensing Reference is an independent resource for travel clinicians comparing licensing paths across the United States.
